title: FNL Themes for Quarto
text:
This is a Quarto template that assists you in creating a report, document, or presentation using the FNLCR branding guidelines.


To create a new document, use the following command:
quarto use template CCBR/quarto-fnl
This will install the extension and create an example qmd file that you can use as a starting place



You may also use this format with an existing Quarto project or document. From the quarto project or document directory, run the following command to install this format:
quarto install extension CCBR/quarto-fnl



To use the format, you can use the format names fnl-html, fnl-revealjs, or fnl-dashboard. For example:
quarto render report.qmd --to fnl-html
or in your document yaml or _quarto.yml file:
format:
  fnl-html






Format
Quarto Source
Rendered Example




HTML

View HTML


revealjs
template-revealjs.qmd
View revealjs


dashboard

title: Default template
text: refer to the Quarto guide for details on writing documents with Quarto: https://quarto.org/

title: Default template
text:
example plot


Code
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)



Attaching package: 'plotly'


The following object is masked from 'package:ggplot2':

    last_plot


The following object is masked from 'package:stats':

    filter


The following object is masked from 'package:graphics':

    layout


Code
plot_cars <- mtcars |>
  ggplot(aes(mpg, cyl)) +
  geom_point()
ggplotly(plot_cars)
